=============================================================
STEP 1: Paste this first (creates the directory):
=============================================================

mkdir -p /mnt/pool/plexiptv-stack && rm -f /tmp/plexiptv.b64

=============================================================
STEP 2: Paste the chunks below ONE AT A TIME:
=============================================================


--- CHUNK 1 (paste this) ---

echo -n '' >> /tmp/plexiptv.b64

--- CHUNK 2 (paste this) ---

echo -n '' >> /tmp/plexiptv.b64

--- CHUNK 3 (paste this) ---

echo -n '' >> /tmp/plexiptv.b64

--- CHUNK 4 (paste this) ---

echo -n '' >> /tmp/plexiptv.b64

=============================================================
STEP 3: Paste this last (extracts files and builds image):
=============================================================

base64 -d /tmp/plexiptv.b64 | tar xzf - -C /mnt/pool/plexiptv-stack/ && echo "Files extracted!" && cd /mnt/pool/plexiptv-stack && docker build -t plexiptv:latest . && echo "SUCCESS: plexiptv:latest image built!"
